executive_summary.headline: NIL Fans rebooted its outreach engine after a 30-day gap. Two sequences rebuilt from audited lists are now live with 716 total members, while LinkedIn prospecting awaits fresh data.
key_changes: Both original sequences paused and fully rebuilt after a compliance & ICP audit on 5/19 — removing 127+ off-ICP contacts (finance/Title IX-only/ADA) and building a master suppression list of 219 previously-sequenced contacts
New combined Compliance Directors list (367 contacts) replaces the original 276-member sequence — cleaner ICP fit, verified emails only
Athletic Directors sequence (440 members, 5.77% open rate) outperforming Compliance Directors (276 members, 3.55%) on email engagement
No LinkedIn prospecting data available for current period — screenshots only covered email sequences
top_risks: LinkedIn prospecting data missing — unable to compute deltas from baseline (372 requests, 64 accepted, 10 replies)
Apollo universe for Dir of Compliance audience approaching ceiling (~625 contacts)
0 replies and 0 meetings across both sequences — engagement exists (opens/clicks) but no conversations converting yet

sequences.name: MMai – NIL Fans – Team – NIL Directors & Compliance – Demo Outreach – Mar 2026 – Anna – v2
MMai – NIL Fans – Team – Division II & III Athlete Activation – Sequence – Mar 2026 – Anna – v2

email.notes: Current period volume lower because sequences were paused and rebuilt on 5/19. Baseline included earlier outreach runs no longer active. Open rate improved 2.7pp (118%) despite lower volume. 10 replies in baseline dropped to 0 — likely because current sequences are in early steps.

linkedin.notes: LinkedIn prospecting data unavailable for current period — screenshots only covered email sequences.

sequences_audited.original_name: MMai – NIL Fans – Team – NIL Directors & Compliance – Demo Outreach – Mar 2026 – Anna – v2
issues: 222 of 416 contacts (53%) failed to load — stuck errors
127 off-ICP contacts: 96 CFO/COO/CRO athletic finance, 16 Title IX-only, 5 ADA/504, 5 Financial Aid, 3 Research Compliance, 2 other
No suppression list — previously sequenced contacts had no exclusion mechanism
Platform unable to export sequence members (manual screenshot extraction required)
sequences_audited.notes: Suppression list built (219 confirmed sequenced contacts) uploaded to Apollo as NILFans_Suppression_Master. Combined list: audited April export (213 contacts, verified primary email) + audited v2 Apollo pull (180 contacts, 24 removed). Apollo universe for this audience estimated at ~625 contacts — approaching ceiling.

pending_actions: Shanon Gray's Athletic Directors sequence needs same suppression audit
Build Division II & III Athlete Activation sequence or retire it
Monitor new Compliance Directors sequence (v3) for deliverability improvement vs. original 53% load failure rate

contact_pipeline.universe_status: Approaching ceiling — net-new contacts will require audience expansion or re-engagement of suppressed list
